paper.title: Agentic CLEAR: Automating Multi-Level Evaluation of LLM Agents

official_code.relationship_to_paper: The requested official commit is dated 2026-06-16, 26 days after immutable arXiv v1 was published on 2026-05-21. It is preserved as post-v1 release evidence and must not be represented as the exact paper-time implementation.

acquisition.verification_notes: The 14-page immutable paper extraction was inspected across the abstract, formal pipeline and algorithm, framework, experiments, taxonomy-alignment and score-prediction results, rubric analysis, conclusions, appendices, and references. The official archive passed ZIP integrity testing; its commit identity and post-v1 timing were verified through GitHub API metadata, and its 137-file inventory exposes the documented trace adapters, intermediate representation, prompts, rubric/task-success evaluators, issue/root-cause runners, dashboard, provider configuration, examples, and tests for subsequent audit. This record establishes acquisition and extraction only; no deep review, evaluator-correctness, causal-root, human-labor, production-utility, generalization, or readiness claim is made.
